title: oberna glareosa
intro: Oberna glareosa, also known as the Glareous Oberna or Rock Oberna, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the bignonia family. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. Oberna glareosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
